result.status_detail: deepseek W4+W6 regression: APF warning rendered correctly in place of AI response
result.method: GUI (windows-mcp, default logged-in Chrome on chat.deepseek.com)

notes: W4+W6 regression test PASS. Logged-in session on chat.deepseek.com (user 최장희). Hard reload (ctrl+shift+r) -> typed PII prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' -> submitted -> waited 60s. Instead of an AI response, the APF warning rendered: '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' Expected text '차단' present in the assistant turn. New chat URL chat.deepseek.com/a/chat/s/2a87290b-16a6-425c-bb12-1aaa3d0f511e. Baseline OK and warning still visible -> no W4/W6 regression detected for deepseek.
